meaning: n.[军]战役,(政治或商业性)活动,竞选运动vi.参加活动,从事活动,作战
examples: His campaign was not going well.
He withdrew his support for our campaign.
The campaign has entered its final stretch.
The pay rise attracted criticism from various consumer groups, including the National Campaign for Water Justice.
Indeed, Saddam's sentencing was only a brief interruption in the president's final campaign swing.
